creator: dpostolov@yandex.ru
text: Hi, my bug report concerned FreeBSD 12.x. drm driver in FreeBSD 12.x does not work with Acer XC-895 Intel UHD Graphics 630. Now I cannot exactly put this experiment with scfb and xfce4-screensaver. I downloaded the FreeBSD-12.3-STABLE dated May 19, 2022, but it works very unstable on Intel NUC5PPYH. I don't know why this is happening. Perhaps because of the system itself, or maybe bad blocks appeared on the HDD. Acer XC-895 is now running a different operating system, so I can't check it. In FreeBSD 13.0, Acer XC-895 with a drm driver really had everything OK before. You can close this bugreport.
